data.intro: It's a special moment for me today! I'm so exited to share with you my last project that I released today!
data.message: We are working of this track since a long time. The track is very positive because we wanned to inspire people in their every day challenges! I played the piano and Jimmy the bass. Josh have made a wonderful job on the arrangement sending us right back to the 70's. We are really proud of it! I hope that you will love it.
